/usr/bin/nvcc  -O3 -DNDEBUG "--generate-code=arch=compute_30,code=[compute_30,sm_30]" -Xcompiler=-fPIC -Wno-deprecated-gpu-targets -shared -dlink CMakeFiles/test_json_import.dir/tests/cpu/test_json_import.cpp.o -o CMakeFiles/test_json_import.dir/cmake_device_link.o   -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/stubs  -L/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/8  liblunara.a  -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl  -L"/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu"
